title: Hololive Weapons
description: A pack that adds custom Hololive themed weapon variants!
body:
![Hololive Weapons logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e753f3bc9b532fb40da7521d915a5969cd37329.png)

# 

This pack adds custom Hololive themed weapon variants that can be obtained by renaming items in an anvil, no mods required!

Included are references to Hololive Japan, Hololive English, and Hololive Indonesia!

 

Renamable items list:

 

Diamond/Netherite Sword to:

 

- Left Oni Katana

- Right Oni Katana

- Bodyguard Katana

- Ricky

- Phoenix Sword

- Hand of Time

- Dagger of Civilization

- Archiver's Redactor

- Thorn

- Feester Gauntlet

- Alien Paintbrush

- Path of Sincerity

- Anya Melfissa

- Umbrella

 

 

Diamond/Netherite Axe to:

 

- Psycho Axe

- Giant Carrot

- Tuning Fork

- Violance

 

 

Mace to:

 

- Knightly Mace

- Blacksmith's Hammer
